places.name: The Wave Organ
places.description: A huge musical instrument played by the ocean.

places.name: Magowan's Infinite Mirror Maze
places.description: A psychedelic labyrinth on the San Francisco bay.

places.name: Secret Tiled Staircase
places.description: An artsy hidden staircase leads to breathtaking views of San Francisco.

places.name: Seward Street Slides
places.description: Bring your own cardboard to the slippery slopes of concrete hidden in a neighborhood park.

places.name: Alcatraz Island
places.description: In all of the 29 years it was in operation, no prisoners ever escaped successfully... or so they claim.

places.name: Peephole Cinema
places.description: A tiny theater hidden in an alley plays a constant stream of short silent films for anyone willing to peer through the peephole.

places.name: Albion Castle
places.description: A 140-year-old castle with underground caves hidden in San Francisco.

places.name: Bourbon & Branch
places.description: A nondescript building that's been functioning as a speakeasy for nearly a century and a half.

places.name: Golden Gate Fortune Cookie Factory
places.description: One of the oldest producers of hand-folded fortune cookies still uses its original secret recipe.
